rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as refining prior social-media emotionality research that focused on message-level outcomes, and the cited paper is exactly a major emotionality-in-UGC study (smartphone use increases emotional language, reduces specificity). Given this clear topical/theoretical linkage in constructs (emotional language in social media text) and no evidence it is merely a perfunctory mention, this pair should be retained for full relation assessment.
